Name: DECAL_PARAM
Description: Defines decal projection properties including size, texture assignment, color tinting, lighting, and behavior rules such as fade and culling.

Fields.Name: Width (X)
Fields.Description: Horizontal size of the decal projection along the X axis.

Fields.Name: Height (Y)
Fields.Description: Vertical size of the decal projection along the Y axis.

Fields.Name: Depth (Z)
Fields.Description: Depth or projection thickness of the decal along the Z axis.

Fields.Name: Texture ID
Fields.Description: Primary texture used for the decal.

Fields.Name: Normal Map Texture ID
Fields.Description: Bump/normal map texture used to simulate surface detail.

Fields.Name: Color: Red
Fields.Description: Red channel tint applied to the decal.

Fields.Name: Color: Green
Fields.Description: Green channel tint applied to the decal.

Fields.Name: Color: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue channel tint applied to the decal.

Fields.Name: Off-Screen Delete Time
Fields.Description: Time in seconds before decal is removed when outside the camera view.

Fields.Name: Parallax Scale
Fields.Description: Strength of parallax mapping effect applied to the decal.

Fields.Name: Light ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for lighting influence applied to the decal.

Fields.Name: Flip Mode
Fields.Description: Controls horizontal or vertical flipping of the decal.

Fields.Name: Rotation Mode
Fields.Description: Defines rotation behavior of the decal projection.
